title: Ben Glisan
compiled_truth: Ben Glisan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-10 to 2001-11-23), Ben Glisan sent 8 and received 307 emails, totalling 315 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (5), [Don Miller](people/don-miller) (3), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (3), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (2), [Andrew Fastow](people/andrew-fastow) (2).
